implementation_notes: Added `import time` after `import re` at line 27. Added `start_time`, `template_count`, `agent_count`, `rule_count`, and `warning_count` counters immediately after the early-return guard blocks (after line 186). Incremented `warning_count` in both manifest-loading except clauses. Incremented `template_count` after the successful template episode sync and `warning_count` in the template sync except block (before the `return False`). Changed agent sync loop to capture return value and increment `agent_count` on truthy result; added `warning_count += 1` in the except block. Same pattern applied to rule sync loop. Before the final `return True`, computed elapsed time and assembled the summary log message: `[Graphiti] Template sync complete: <summary> synced (<elapsed>s)[, <N> warnings]`. No existing logic or signatures were changed.
requirements_addressed: Summary message logged at end of sync_template_to_graphiti()
Count of templates synced included in summary
Count of agents synced included in summary
Count of rules synced included in summary
Total elapsed time (seconds, one decimal) displayed in summary
YAML/JSON parse warning count displayed in suffix when warnings occurred
No changes to existing logic or function signatures

completion_promises.criterion_text: Summary message logged at end of sync_template_to_graphiti()
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info() call immediately before the final `return True` in sync_template_to_graphiti(). The message follows the format: '[Graphiti] Template sync complete: <summary> synced (<elapsed>s)'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Counts include: templates, agents, rules synced
completion_promises.evidence: template_count incremented after successful add_episode for template manifest. agent_count incremented when sync_agent_to_graphiti returns True. rule_count incremented when sync_rule_to_graphiti returns True. template_count only appears in summary_parts when non-zero (no manifest = no template count).
start_time = time.monotonic() placed after early-return guards. elapsed = time.monotonic() - start_time computed just before the summary log. Elapsed displayed as `({elapsed:.1f}s)` in the message.

completion_promises.criterion_text: YAML parse warnings count displayed if any occurred
completion_promises.evidence: warning_count incremented in: json.JSONDecodeError except (manifest), generic Exception except (manifest), template add_episode except (before return False), agent sync except, rule sync except. warning_suffix is appended to the log message only when warning_count > 0.

Only additive changes: new import, new counters, capture of return values from sync functions (they already returned bool), and the summary log before return True. No conditional logic, function signatures, or return values were altered.
